passages.passage_text: Study the following information to answer the following questions. A number arrangement machine, when given a particular input, rearranges it following a particular rule. The following is the illustration of the input and the steps of the arrangement.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
What will be the 4th step of the following input?
Input '24, 88, 22, 34, 81, 90, 38'

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
The second step of a given input is 45, 27, 35, 28, 42, 15.
What will be Step VII for the input?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
In how many steps would the following arrangement be yielded by the given input?
Input         '91, 45, 67, 51, 32, 17'
Arrangement  100, 81, 169, 36, 25, 64

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
What will be the Step V of the following input?
Input '37, 48, 91, 22, 49'

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Find the Step III of the following input.
Input '17, 50, 37, 23, 35'

solutions.solution: (b) (Digits sum of each number of input)²

(a) ∵ Step V = Each number of the input/5
∴ Each number of the input = (Step V) × 5
(b) (1st digit - 2nd digit) of each number of the input.

(a) Product of digits of each number of the input.
The above example gives you an idea about the type of mathematical/arithmetical operations that can take place in such problems.
